findings.message: Read model contract tests only validate method presence and return types. They don't verify that update_from_event() actually mutates internal state, or that queries return meaningful data after event consumption. While acceptable for port contract tests (behavior is adapter-specific), this means the CQRS projection pipeline has no behavioral coverage until adapter tests are written.

DomainEventBus._record() trims history using remove_at(0) in a loop which is O(n) per removal for Array. For the default max_history of 500 this is fine, but if max_history grows significantly, consider using a ring buffer or Array.slice() for O(1) trimming.

Publishing services (publish_to_family_library_service.gd, review_publish_request_service.gd, unpublish_world_service.gd) have not been wired to emit events through the DomainEventBus yet. Events are created locally but not propagated. This is expected since those services are from TASK-010 and wiring should happen when publishing is finalized, but it should be tracked.

ParentAuditReadModel.get_timeline() accepts from_iso and to_iso as strings but doesn't specify the expected format or validation behavior. Contract test doesn't exercise date range filtering. Document the expected ISO 8601 format and out-of-range behavior.

acceptance_criteria.domain_events_emitted: PASS - WorldEditedEvent, RuleChangedEvent, AIAssistanceRequestedEvent, and SafetyInterventionTriggeredEvent are emitted through DomainEventBus in their respective application services. The bus uses a null-safe optional injection pattern (DomainEventBus = null).
acceptance_criteria.read_model_interfaces: PASS - KidStatusReadModel (project status, recent projects), ParentAuditReadModel (timeline, interventions), and AIPerformanceReadModel (metrics, tool statistics) are defined as outbound ports with update_from_event() projection hooks.

checklist.hexagonal_boundaries: PASS - DomainEventBus extends RefCounted, lives in src/domain/events/, and has no Node/scene dependencies. Read models are outbound ports in src/ports/outbound/. Event bus is injected via DI, not imported as singleton.
checklist.kid_safety_and_parental_controls: PASS - SafetyInterventionTriggeredEvent is emitted on both input and output moderation blocks with decision_type, policy_rule, trigger_context, and safe_alternative_offered fields. ParentAuditReadModel provides get_interventions() for parent visibility.
checklist.contract_tests: PARTIAL - DomainEventBus contract test is thorough (subscribe, emit, history cap, unsubscribe). Read model contract tests are shallow (method presence + type validation only). See medium finding.
checklist.cross_agent_review: This review constitutes the required cross-agent review for TASK-004.

positive_notes: Clean consistent DI pattern: event bus is optional (= null) in all service setup() methods, with null-check before emit. Services work without event bus wired.
DomainEventBus supports both type-filtered and wildcard subscriptions with deduplication — well-designed for CQRS projections.
Safety event wiring in RequestAICreationHelpService emits SafetyInterventionTriggeredEvent for both input and output moderation blocks — complete audit trail.
Event bus contract test verifies history cap, subscribe/unsubscribe lifecycle, and type routing.
summary: TASK-004 delivers a clean, well-designed event bus infrastructure with proper CQRS-lite read model interfaces. Event wiring covers world, rule, AI, and safety actions through consistent null-safe DI. One medium finding: read model contract tests lack behavioral coverage (update_from_event doesn't verify state mutation). Three low findings for future tracking. Overall: APPROVE.
